what: Clear the active project (and vault) from the navigation store and navigate back to the project grid
why: Allows the user to deselect the current project by clicking its name in the ContextualSidebar header, returning to the full project list

ui.trigger: User clicks the project name button (title='Back to list') in the ContextualSidebar header

success_handling.criteria: Active project is cleared from the navigation store

decisions.reason: clearContext() clears both activeProject and activeVault — used here because a project context implies no vault context
decisions.rationale: Calling clearContext ensures the sidebar disappears entirely. navigate('/projects') returns the user to the project grid.
